name: Prosper
description: Your people are your business, give them the tools they need to succeed. Learn more about Prosper

reviews.review_title: A must resource for all companies
reviews.review_pros: Prosper Ex has been fantastic for our company with retaining staff and keeping balance. Highly recommended
reviews.review_cons: Nil - this company has been fantastic and assisted our agency

reviews.review_pros: Good communication between management and employees
reviews.review_cons: The subscription fee can be relatively high especially for small businesses

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Implementation was quick, and our CSM [sensitive content hidden] is so responsive. Whenever I've had a request she's gotten back to me within the same day, which is fantastic.
reviews.review_pros: I loved leaning on their org psychologist's expertise by using the prosper EX engagement survey. It's great that ongoing surveys also add to the happiness metrics. I'm excited to use the 1-to-1 functionality moving forward for our performance management process.
reviews.review_cons: There are a few functionalities and tweaks I would love to see built into the product. Our CSM collates my feedback, and its great to know some items are already in the pipeline. I have already seen the product improve in my short time using it.

reviews.review_pros: We love how easy the platform is to use. It has already proven to be successful in support team member development
reviews.review_cons: Nothing we have found to dislike just yet

reviews.review_description: Overall its been a great journey so far, certainly great value and looking forward to implement more of Prosper EXs tools.
reviews.review_pros: The Prosper EX team has been fantastic to collaborate with. Initially, we implemented their eNPS surveys for a monthly snapshot of our business, which proved so effective that we soon adopted their Engagement survey to run biannually. The feedback from our employees has been overwhelmingly positive, and we've actively utilized much of the data received. This year, we're excited to introduce the 1-to-1 tool, moving us further towards paperless processes.
reviews.review_cons: Moving from paper to digital comes with some resistance to change. Also understanding initially how to best interpret the data and how to action wasn’t instant. However, my customer success manager has been very helpful throughout.

reviews.review_description: Great value compared to some competitors, the platform is easy to use, integrated with our payroll system minimizes on admin. Having all our performance reviews, job chats, and development plans in one place is fantastic. We've also gained valuable, actionable insights from the annual and mid-year engagement surveys.
reviews.review_pros: The Prosper EX team is great to work with. Having all our engagement survey reports and performance management 1-1s in one place has been fantastic. Our structured onboarding and exit processes are now automated, which we love.
reviews.review_cons: Initially, I felt a bit overwhelmed by all the features of Prosper EX. However, the PEX team guided me through each tool week by week. They started with the annual performance survey and how to interpret the data, then moved on to running our performance reviews. Now, I can manage everything on my own.

reviews.review_description: Great. That saying "You get out what you put in" is true. Our business is fully invested in using ProsperEX and we are seeing some great returns on this investment.
reviews.review_pros: The surveys and feedback we get from our people are extremely beneficial and we have experienced big improvements in our company culture and staff retention.
reviews.review_cons: There is limited ability to create unique performance review templates for our business. However, we have been told this is on their road map and this ability may change in the future.

reviews.review_description: This has been one of the easiest businesses to work with and the support has been everything we need. We are still learning and it has been impressive to see how much development has occurred within Prosper Ex since we joined less than a year ago.
reviews.review_pros: The support on implementation has been second to none and made the roll out pain-free. This has continued with training and support in how to read results and identify what is working well V how we can improve.
reviews.review_cons: The management dash was extremely simple to use to begin with but the screen has become more 'busy'. Would like to see the simplified dash return, with room to drill down as and when we need.

reviews.review_description: We absolutely love our partnership with Will, Renee and the Prosper EX Team. What began as an initial discussion around employee engagement has grown and flourished into something far greater.
reviews.review_pros: The Prosper EX team developed a comprehensive engagement strategy for the business and have since helped us redefine our core values, deploy a number of critical company surveys, provided reports and recommendations on the data and supported us with the implementation of performance measures for our 200+ employees.
reviews.review_cons: Inability to upload files to employee accounts. This however is coming online as a platform update soon.

reviews.review_description: It has been very good, and I look forward to seeing how the business grows and the implementation of the new ideas they have.
reviews.review_pros: Personalized assistance to navigate system and explanation of data.
reviews.review_cons: NA-Haven't had any negative experiences to date.

reviews.review_title: Transforming our Business with Prosper EX
reviews.review_description: My overall experience with Prosper EX has been highly positive. It has proven to be a powerful tool that has streamlined our processes, improved our efficiency, and provided deep insights into our operations. The slight learning curve at the beginning is well worth it, given the benefits the platform offers. I've been particularly impressed with the continual updates and improvements made to the software, which show a clear commitment to staying on the cutting edge and addressing user feedback. Prosper EX is more than just a tool; it has been a catalyst for growth, and I highly recommend it to businesses looking to enhance their operational efficiency and drive growth.
reviews.review_pros: The standout feature of Prosper EX for me has been its exceptional user interface and overall ease of use. Right from the start, the platform felt intuitive, allowing me to navigate through its various functionalities with minimal effort. Another major plus is the platform's analytics and reporting tools. These have provided us with invaluable insights into our operations, helping us make data-driven decisions and know what actions drive positive team morale. Prosper EX's customer service has also been outstanding. The support team is knowledgeable, responsive, and genuinely committed to helping users get the most out of the software.
reviews.review_cons: I would recommend this product for organisations with 50 or more staff to ensure they receive maximum return on investment.

reviews.review_description: From the moment I engaged with the Sales team/founder Prosper EX was consultative, listened to my objectives as a leader and crafted a custom system that helped to evolve the way we connect with our people. Overall satisfaction scores are up within our business, turnover of staff is down and overall we indirectly have a happier customer base.
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use, simple setup and great user experience.
reviews.review_cons: Nothing has flagged as a con yet, we are very happy with Prosper EX

reviews.review_description: The customer service support has been exceptional, [sensitive content hidden] is incredibly helpful and very responsive.
reviews.review_pros: We have a large workforce across 32 locations. We now have the data to allow us to proactively develop people strategies to ensure we have and engaged and happy workforce.
reviews.review_cons: Nothing, the platform is fantastic and we are a really happy

reviews.review_title: Such an easy and supportive experience!
reviews.review_description: Very user-friendly platform, it's intuitive and simple, while still doing all the things you'd want in the Team Engagement space. The integration with other programs is great too and makes streamlining HR processes super easy!
reviews.review_pros: Their Customer Support is second to none. [sensitive content hidden] is our Customer Success Manager and nothing is ever too much trouble for her. We've also had contact with a number of other members of the ProsperEX team and we've been really impressed with the level of internal communication and consistency between them - no matter who you're talking to they always have all the information. The follow up and turn around time is always efficient too.
reviews.review_cons: As noted above, nothing is too much trouble. The ProsperEX team always find a solution to anything that pops up, and usually within the day. The only thing I could say we've "liked least" would be the Kudos functionality. It doesn't quite work in the way that we intended to use it, but I know this feature is expected to be under development so we're excited to see what else we might be able to do with it!

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: It is a great partnership that allows us to solve a problem for our clients while having a functional platform with ease of use
reviews.review_pros: The ease of use with the platform, allows us to partner with ProsperEx and customize our requirements. We have full control over the content and resources on the platform.
reviews.review_cons: It's too soon to say as we are in the early days with ProsperEX

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: It is easy to use and provides helpful feedback to show where the company can improve.
reviews.review_cons: Takes a little time to get comfortable with all aspects of the product.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: The customer support has been personalised, responsive and fantastic overall.
reviews.review_cons: As with any new system, getting to grips with how it works and integrates with our own systems.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: User friendly and is a useful tool for management to keep track of their teams learning and to have everything you need all in one place. They also have an excellent customer service.
reviews.review_cons: I haven’t encountered any issues so far.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Being able to solve communication block was very important to us and Prosper EX has delivered that!
reviews.review_pros: The product is very user friendly and the set up was a breeze.
reviews.review_cons: No complaints, It's still early but so far so good!

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: ther Prosper EX platform is an easy way for employee's to understand employee's needs, thoughts and motivations and helps everyone feel valued. It also gives you the the data you need to need to back-up and formuate critical stratagies that no one wants to make in the dark.
reviews.review_cons: I would like the platform to go further as a communication tool for all employees. For example, the ability to "reskin" elements of the page to promote company events or news that effects everyone. Essentially like a digital tannoy system.
